title: poa lurida
intro: Poa lurida, also known as the yellow foxtail grass or green foxtail, is a perennial grass native to North America, particularly in the western regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa lurida include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
